core.notes: Stable command descriptors, begin/end action attributes, shortcut option metadata, keyboard, mouse, and scroll shortcut resolution, configurable shortcut overrides, command hints, repeat suppression, auto-clear sidedef texture toggle action, and menu/toolbar availability synchronization are implemented. Full UDB action manager parity remains incomplete.

Compiler and nodebuilder configuration metadata is parsed, including recursive cfg discovery and UDB-style first-definition wins behavior for duplicate compiler names. Nodebuilder `%FI` and `%FO` argument substitution, compiler support-file resolution and staging, UDB-style nodebuilder process start settings, and UDB-style nodebuilder process result handling are covered. ACC-style `%FI`, `%FO`, `%FS`, `%PT`, and `%PS` script compiler argument substitution, UDB-style directory and archive script compile planning, ACS map-script and external-library compile preflight checks, ACS include resolution and temp-directory copying, UDB-style ACC and BCC process start settings, compiler temporary-input error remapping, ACS include error source resolution, ACC, BCC, and ZT-BCC compiler error line parsing including temporary path cleanup, and UDB-style script compiler error list formatting and de-duplication are covered. Full nodebuilder execution, script compiler execution, and editor integration remain incomplete.

Game configuration parsing and thing catalog metadata are partial. Script configuration loading, exact UDB script type name parsing, UDB-style script type detection, UDB-style script navigator entries, UDB-style script configuration selection rules, script snippet loading, map-lump script configuration resolution, script lexer keyword set preparation, script autocomplete entry preparation, function calltip argument tracking, and calltip argument highlighting are covered. Recent actor merge parity includes locked sprites, bright and dynamic light recalculation, blocking severity preservation, UDB stuck-inside error checks for solid actors, non-solid error-check preservation, DistanceCheck preservation for undefined CVARs, unknown preview sprite fallback, MAPINFO DoomEdNums overrides from archived unsupported actors, and explicit-category-only replacement recategorization.

Avalonia editor controls cover the main shell, menus, toolbar, status area, settings, shortcuts, recent files, error/status history, auto-clear sidedef texture toggle, selection groups, map markers, custom fields, basic property dialogs, UDB-style script document tab identity with persisted view settings, script compiler error routing by tab type, and script tab title updates. Full UDB control set parity remains incomplete.

Resource list serialization, WAD, PK3 and directory resources including ignored path filters, nested PK3, mixed priority stack, palette, colormap, sprite, texture, flat, hires, voxel, model discovery behavior, UDB-style script find-usages matching, and script resource identity with resource-scoped usage results have focused coverage. Full UDB DataManager parity remains incomplete.
Patch data model, thing parsing, frame parsing, sprite replacements, parser behavior, and thing catalog merge support exist. Full UDB baseline DehackedData table processing remains incomplete.

Selection conversion, duplicate, copy helpers, marked-geometry cloning with virtual sectors, virtual-sector cleanup preservation, paste tag remapping for tag-typed action arguments, stitching, merge geometry mode, tag helpers, owner-specific tag allocation, format-aware tag searches/statistics/replacement and next-free-tag allocation including tag-typed action arguments, tag statistics label editing, named flags, custom fields, UDB-style things filter validation, format-aware things filter criteria, and several edit-mode surfaces are covered. Full UDB editing mode parity remains incomplete.

Editor startup, window placement, dirty-state prompts, reload, close, autosave recovery, recent files and maps, status history, error logs, update-check replacement, file conflict checks, before/after command launch plans, UDB-style nodebuilder output validation, UDB-style auto-clear sidedef texture preference persistence, and UDB-style Test Map token expansion are covered. Full UDB application orchestration remains incomplete.

Focused parity exists for point-in-polygon, linedef measurement, nearest vertex, linedef and thing queries, snapping, map-wide range wrappers, blockmap traversal, and selected geometry stitching helpers. Full trace paths, curve tools, triangulation, frustum behavior, label placement, and validation remain incomplete.
The editor shell exposes 2D and 3D mode entry points, toolbar/menu wiring, shortcuts, and visual-mode scaffolding. Full GZBuilder visual editing behavior remains incomplete.

Doom, Hexen, and UDMF map loading and writing have focused compatibility coverage, including invalid element filtering, unsigned binary fields, UDMF block and field order, custom fields, stream facades, map conversion, and PK3/WAD resource IO. Directory and PK3 resource options expose root textures and flats like UDB, and nested directory WAD high-resolution replacements participate in priority order. Classic texture composition honors UDB patch offset compatibility flags and WAD patch fallback ordering around flat ranges. Full universal IO parity remains incomplete.

Map model coverage includes element collections, map options, selection groups, marks, tags, argument handling, property copying, clone and clipboard snapshots, binary format cleanup, blockmap population, UDB-style sidedef unused texture cleanup, map-level sidedef texture cleanup, and several geometry mutation helpers. Full UDB MapSet behavior remains incomplete.
Basic thing, linedef, sector, sidedef, UDMF flag, custom field, map marker, map options, and namespace dialogs are present. Full UDB property panel and field editor parity remains incomplete.

2D map rendering, grid display, UDB-style bounded grid stepping, textured previews, sprite and thing previews, camera texture image handling, dynamic bitmap images, unknown images, voxel image discovery, and large-map 3D performance guards have coverage. Full UDB renderer and visual mode rendering parity remains incomplete.

WAD, PK3, nested PK3, directory, mixed stack, texture, flat, patch, sprite, hires, voxel, model, camera texture, dynamic bitmap, unknown image, nested WAD folder-resource and hires priority, and cache invalidation behavior have focused coverage. Full lazy loading, advanced namespace behavior, and UDB DataManager parity remain incomplete.

Game configuration types, thing metadata, argument render metadata, map format flags, texture definitions, and ZDoom data structures are partially modeled. Full UDB type system parity remains incomplete.
Mode switching, 3D entry, selected geometry editing surfaces, command shortcuts, status hints, and rendering scaffolding exist. Full UDB visual mode tools and interaction behavior remain incomplete.

Main window, dialogs for open map, settings, shortcuts, status history, errors, autosave recovery, selection groups, custom fields, map markers, and map options are present. Full UDB window and docking system parity remains incomplete.

DECORATE and ZScript parsers cover many actor metadata, state preview, goto, user variable, region, DoomEdNum, DamageType, DECORATE include validation, DECORATE state cast validation, DECORATE user-variable validation, inherited user-variable shadow validation, ZScript include validation, ZScript preprocessor validation, ZScript top-level version declarations, ZScript top-level const validation, ZScript top-level enum validation, ZScript top-level struct validation, ZScript top-level identifier validation, ZScript class body terminator validation, ZScript duplicate class and mixin validation, ZScript fatal final and sealed inheritance constraints, ZScript actor and mixin self-inheritance rejection, ZScript mixin parent validation, ZScript mixin user-variable default behavior, ZScript mixin size-default behavior, ZScript extension size-default behavior, ZScript extension ordering validation, ZScript extended Spawn inheritance, and actor merge behaviors, including MAPINFO DoomEdNums overrides from archived unsupported actors. TEXTURES, MODELDEF, SNDINFO, SNDSEQ, TERRAIN, LOCKDEFS, DECALDEF, VOXELDEF, IWADINFO, CVARINFO, REVERBS, X11 RGB, MAPINFO, ZMAPINFO, and GLDEFS all have focused parser coverage. TEXTURES includes default-scale composition metadata, UDB-style Graphic skipping, UDB-style unknown declaration consumption, namespace-specific duplicate handling, and UDB-order patch flip/rotation transforms. MODELDEF validates supported model file extensions and non-negative model-related indexes. GLDEFS covers lights, objects, glow metadata, skyboxes, includes, invalid declaration abort behavior, and unknown structure handling. Full actor semantics, model rendering, voxel rendering, and broader ZDoom data integration remain incomplete.
DBuilder uses a cross-platform Silk.NET OpenGL rendering abstraction. Full UDB native OpenGL parity remains incomplete.

plugins.notes: GZDoom 3D floor data resolution and display toggles exist. Full 3DFloorMode editing workflow remains incomplete.
Blockmap construction, queries, and editor overlay toggles exist. Full explorer UI and diagnostics remain incomplete.
Selected map effect helpers exist, including slope and 3D floor related behavior. Full BuilderEffects plugin parity remains incomplete.
Core edit modes, draw mode surfaces, selection conversion, stitching, filters, and error-check surfaces are partially represented. Full mode set and docked tooling remain incomplete.

UDB-style RGB/HSV conversion, picker display formatting, packed UDMF color integers, and sector lightcolor/fadecolor field behavior exist. Color picker controls, dialogs, and dynamic light editing remain incomplete.

UDB-style comment grouping over vertex, linedef, sidedef, sector, and thing UDMF fields exists, including current-mode filtering, set/remove helpers, selection targets, and padded square view-area calculation. Docked UI, live selection wiring, and rendering integration remain incomplete.
Nodebuilder lump validation and related IO helpers exist. Full NodesViewer visualization UI remains incomplete.

Reject table IO coverage exists, including UDB-style REJECT lump validation and highlighted-sector visibility relation classification for default, highlighted, bidirectional, and one-way overlay states. Full RejectExplorer UI and overlay rendering workflow remain incomplete.
Sound propagation reachability helpers and editor command wiring exist. Full mode UI and plugin workflow remain incomplete.
Stair building helpers and editor command surfaces exist. Full StairSectorBuilder plugin parity remains incomplete.

Tag listing and reveal surfaces exist. UDB-style tag explorer entry filtering and sorting model exists for tags, actions, comments, and polyobjects. Full docked tree UI and navigation workflow remain incomplete.

UDB-style absolute and relative tag range calculation exists, including duplicate detection, skip-used handling, out-of-range reporting, selected element initial-tag capture, and selected element assignment. Toolbar button and form UI remain incomplete.
